Our Cleaning Services

Regular Home Cleaning

When: regular upkeep, maintaining cleanliness, staying ahead of mess
For: busy families, professionals, anyone who values their time over chores
Learn More ✦

Cleaning for Moving In or Moving Out

When: moving in or out, end of lease, property turnover, getting deposit back
For: renters, home buyers/sellers, property managers, real estate agents
Learn More ✦

Deep Cleaning for Homes That Need Extra Care

When: seasonal refresh, after guests, home hasn't been cleaned in months
For: homeowners needing a reset, pre-sale prep, post-event cleanup
Learn More ✦

Airbnb Cleaning

When: between guest stays, same-day turnovers, preparing for check-ins
For: vacation rental hosts, Airbnb owners, property managers
Learn More ✦

Post-Construction Cleaning

When: after renovation, construction completion, remodeling projects
For: contractors, homeowners, builders, developers, renovation projects
Learn More ✦

Commercial Cleaning

When: maintaining office spaces, after-hours cleaning, weekly maintenance
For: offices, retail stores, medical facilities, coworkings, small businesses
Learn More ✦

Clear & Honest — What We Don't Do

For your safety and ours, we don't provide:
Hoarding situations
Garage/construction cleanup
Paint or adhesive removal
Carpet shampooing
Exterior window cleaning
Heavy furniture moving
High ladder work
Mold/biohazard cleaning
We focus on doing a few things really well. That’s why we don’t take on services that compromise quality.

FAQ

Yes. One-time cleaning is available, however ongoing weekly or bi-weekly service offers better pricing, priority scheduling, and more consistent results.
Most of our long-term clients choose bi-weekly cleaning as the best balance of cost and cleanliness. Weekly service is recommended for larger homes or families with pets.
No. Deep cleaning is typically done during the first visit or as needed. Regular cleaning focuses on maintaining a consistently clean home.
Yes. You can reschedule, skip, or pause your service with advance notice. We offer flexible scheduling for recurring clients.
No. Many clients are not home during service and provide access instructions in advance.
Cleaning time depends on your home's size, condition, and selected services. We'll confirm estimated timing before your appointment.
For recurring clients, we aim to assign the same cleaner whenever possible to ensure consistency and familiarity with your home.
Pricing is based on home size, condition, frequency of service, and any selected add-ons.
